entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: One of the world's largest producers and consumers of pulses, focusing on transforming seed systems for food security.

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Grains that serve as the cornerstone of food and nutrition security in India.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Plants related to pulses whose seed systems in India require transformation to meet future demand.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring access to nutritious food, supported by the production of pulses in India.

entities.name: SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: The infrastructure and processes for seed production and distribution that India aims to transform to meet future demand.

relationships.description: India is one of the world's largest producers and consumers of pulses
India is focusing on the future of legume seed systems
Pulses are the cornerstone of food and nutrition security in India
India's food and nutrition security is supported by pulses
India needs to transform its seed systems to meet future demand
Pulses are part of the seed systems that need transformation in India
Legumes are part of the seed systems that need transformation in India
